comments.body: Impl notes (in progress): the outbound update field set is produced by outbound_fields._map_local_to_jira_fields (mirrored scalars = the de-facto allowlist). A local field that maps but is excluded from the outbound update must emit a deduped BRIDGE_ALERT (dedup key per (ticket,field)) via alert_store, mirroring fetcher._flag_unmapped_statuses (fetcher.py:180-234). Emit at run_differs seam (has repo_root). Preserve behavior (drop still happens; only observability added).

compiled_state.description:
# BUG: outbound field-allowlist drops are silent

## Reproduction Steps
1. Have a local field that maps to Jira but is not in the outbound update allowlist.
2. Change it locally; run reconcile.

**Expected:** a deduped alert notes the dropped field (mirroring the unmapped-status alert).
**Actual:** the field is dropped silently at `apply_outbound.py:117-124` with no signal — the only
place the reconciler degrades without telling anyone.

## What / files
- `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/apply_outbound.py:117-124` — emit a deduped BRIDGE_ALERT on drop.
- Mirror the pattern at `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/fetcher.py:180-234` (unmapped-status alert).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] An outbound field dropped by the update allowlist emits a deduped alert.
- [ ] Alert is deduped per (ticket, field) so it does not spam every pass.
- [ ] Regression test asserting the alert fires on a dropped field.
compiled_state.title: Silent outbound field-allowlist drop: no observability

verify_commands.dd_text: allowlist-dropped field emits a deduped alert
